name: Manufacturing (Zimbabwe)
definition: Businesses transforming materials into finished or intermediate goods: food and beverage processing, consumer goods, building materials, chemicals, metal fabrication, textiles and pharmaceutical manufacture.

subSectors.name: Food and beverage processing
subSectors.description: Milling, baking, dairy, beverages and agro-processing.

subSectors.name: Building materials
subSectors.description: Cement products, bricks, timber and steel fabrication for construction.

subSectors.name: Chemicals and plastics
subSectors.description: Industrial chemicals, paints, packaging and plastics.

typicalBusinessSizes.description: Home and backyard industries and single-machine shops.
Workshop-scale plants with a small workforce.
Factory operations with formal shifts and quality control.

officialSizeThresholds.note: Official MSME/industrial classification bands were not verified from an official source in this revision.

notes: Descriptive segmentation for product design; not an official statistical classification.
